utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six items. Each is fully specified with appropriate details: (1) property includes name, type, price, and features; (2) financing includes method, home value, budget range, proceeds, and timeline; (3) legal_services includes estimated cost and included tasks; (4) moving_services includes provider, detailed cost breakdown, and total range; (5) setup_services includes utilities and connections with cost range; (6) total_budget includes a complete cost breakdown and overall total. All items are fully covered according to the required details.
